name: com.navigationframework.core
description: An input-agnostic UI navigation framework for UGUI. Provides a graph-based data model (nodes, connections, groups, pages) and a runtime that exposes Move/Submit/Cancel, decoupled from any specific input source. Includes a GraphView-based editor for authoring navigation graphs.

samples.description: Shared scripts every other sample depends on (KeyboardInputSource, NavigationFocusVisual). Import this first.
Static equip-slot style menu — the simplest possible use case, framework wiring only.
Selection list/grid over a fixed set of authored items.
Tabbed settings screen using NavigationPage and SwitchToPage.
Inactive-by-default popup that takes over navigation focus and restores it on close.
Runtime-spawned carousel items with wraparound paging layered on top of Move().
Auto-scrolls a ScrollRect to keep the focused node visible on NodeChanged.
Dynamically generated nodes with custom (non-grid) connections.
